Landing.title: Obraims
Landing.description: Turn borrower applications and documents into structured loan files, AI-generated summaries, risk flags, and review-ready credit workflows.
Landing.workflowAlt: Obraims intake, document, and review workflow

OfficerDashboard.title: Review queue
OfficerDashboard.description: Prioritize submitted files, review AI-generated risk summaries, and move applications forward.

ApplicationDetail.noNotes: No internal notes have been added yet.
ApplicationDetail.notePlaceholder: Add underwriting observations, borrower follow-up, or analyst notes.
ApplicationDetail.noAiSummary: No AI summary has been generated yet.
ApplicationDetail.defaultAction: Review borrower file and update status.
ApplicationDetail.placeholderCapabilities: Production KYC, bank integrations, payments, and complex underwriting models are placeholders for later releases.

NewApplication.title: Create loan application
NewApplication.description: Capture the essential borrower and loan fields needed to start underwriting.
NewApplication.defaultPurpose: Working capital for inventory purchase and receivables bridge.

Borrower.title: Application status
Borrower.description: Borrowers can track loan file progress, see document gaps, and respond to information requests.
Borrower.messagesDescription: View officer-approved messages about your loan applications.

Login.title: Sign in to Obraims
Login.description: Use the email associated with your application.
Login.productionNote: Demo role buttons are shown only for local development or when demo auth is explicitly enabled.

Admin.title: Workspace overview
Admin.description: View all MVP users and applications across borrower, officer, analyst, and admin roles.
Admin.rolePolicyNote: Production role policies, permissions, and audit controls will be added after MVP workflow validation.

Documents.title: Upload underwriting documents
Documents.description: Files are stored locally in development and basic metadata is extracted for the review workflow.
Documents.created: Draft application captured. Upload required documents to continue review.

OfficerInbox.title: Officer inbox
OfficerInbox.description: Drafts generated by Obraims Agent stay here until an officer edits, approves, or rejects them.
OfficerInbox.approvedNotice: Message approved in the mock workflow. No external email was sent.

AgentReview.title: Agent review queue
AgentReview.description: Review agent-generated tasks, checklists, and draft communications before anything borrower-facing is sent.

AgentWorkspace.description: Agent actions are drafts and recommendations only. Officer approval is required before borrower-facing communication or status changes.
AgentWorkspace.approvedNotice: Message approved in mock workflow and added to the conversation history. No external communication was sent.
AgentWorkspace.rejectedNotice: Draft rejected. Agent action was logged in the mock workflow.
AgentWorkspace.analysisDescription: Compare uploaded documents against required document rules for this loan type.
AgentWorkspace.runToGenerateChecklist: Run the agent analysis to generate a checklist.
AgentWorkspace.followUpDescription: Edit before approval. Approval does not send external email in this sprint.
AgentWorkspace.subject: Subject
AgentWorkspace.runToGenerateMessage: Run analysis to generate a borrower message draft.

Metadata.title: Obraims MVP
Metadata.description: AI-assisted lending workflow platform for borrower intake, document collection, and loan review.

NotFound.title: Application unavailable
NotFound.description: The requested loan application does not exist in the MVP data set.

Errors.invalidApplication: Please check the application fields and try again.
